Speech.Text: Commander,+ I have the guest I mentioned in my report.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: Interesting look he’s got.++ Got here in no time.++ Especially considering you’re made of ore.++.++.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: Where do you even come from?++ You wouldn't happen to be some lab-grown scout,+ sent to check things out beyond the Barrier, would you?

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: Though.++.++.++ given their precision,+ they wouldn't have sent you in such a mess.+ You're literally falling apart here.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: So that’s how it is.++.++.++ ... I can’t hear your words,+ but.++.++.++ ... even you aren’t entirely sure yourself.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: Anyway,+ even with your current form,+ it doesn't matter anymore.++ It's not for us,+the dead folks,+  pass judgment by looks,+ heh.++.++.
Commander.++.++.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: Berlich,+ you understand it all yourself.++ We’ve discussed about this.++ He could be our only hope.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: We have nothing left to lose.

Speech.Name: Berlich
Speech.Text: Got it.++ My apologies for distracting you.++ Please,+ carry on.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: Ahem,+ so.++ See this crystal on my table?++ We need to find more like it.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: If you head northwest a bit,+ almost to the very center of the island,+ as far as the crossroads,+ you should find them there.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: In exchange for the crystals you find,+ we will give you further information regarding this location.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: Do we have a deal?

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: Interesting.++.++. And yet you accepted.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: Thank you.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: Perhaps this was to be expected.++.++.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: What have you come for?

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: You know I won't give you the information for nothing.+ Though.++.++.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: I can give you information who it is you are going to face.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: Mostly,+ you'll face skeletons with shovels or even bare hands,+ however.++.++.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: One of them has a grenade.++ That bastard right there is the reason we won't go near that spot.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: So be careful.++ I don’t think even you would make it out in one piece if it damages you.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: I wish you good luck.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: Good luck.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: So, you changed your mind, huh?

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: You didn't even accept this deal,+ and after coming here you dare to ASK ME QUESTIONS?!?

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: Get out.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: Oh.++.++.++ Just wonderful.++ Let's get to the point.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: Since you already know the main plan,+ then in this case you should obviously be sure in your decision.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: And if you’re really going there.++.++.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: There will be a skeleton with a grenade at the end.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: Don't thank me.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: What?

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: Very interesting specimen you are.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: Came up,+ stood there,+ walked off.++.++.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: DO YOU THINK THIS IS A WALK-THROUG YARD!?.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: Get out.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: You know what's required. Now, get to your task.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: You don't understand any fucking language.++.++.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: I'll need a pack of cigarettes.++.++.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: It dawned on him.++.++.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: I've gotta smoke.++.++.

Speech.Name: Berlich
Speech.Text: Here is the penultimate one.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: Now++.++.++.++ Fair-Blue Ore,+ off on your mission and stop being a pain in my skull.

Speech.Name: Commander
Speech.Text: Did you know that coffee helps with dementia?.

Speech.Name: The God of this world.
Speech.Text: Well,+ I haven't made this option yet.++ So, look forward to the next ++++u++++p+++d+++a++t++e+s!!!))))

Speech.Name: The God of this world.
Speech.Text: Yeah, I promise,+ I’ll be releasing an update soon and adding this dialogue option.+ Honestly!))))

Speech.Name: The God of this world.
Speech.Text: Man,+ if I’d worked just a little harder,+ you’d have that option already.++ I’ll add it later)))).

Speech.Name: The God of this world.
Speech.Text: Maybe I'll get around to the code one day.+ But currently?+ I’m just lazy.)))))))

Speech.Name: The God of this worl.
Speech.Text: Well, nothing here for now)))). But you can check out this file if you want.
